invariants.statement: No critical state exists only in conversation; it lives in versioned files.
invariants.rationale: State must be recoverable without a prior conversation.
invariants.escalation: If a task would leave load-bearing state only in chat, record it as a file first.

invariants.statement: Phone-destructive operations require explicit operator approval before execution.
invariants.rationale: Firmware rescue, repair, flashing, erasing, relocking, or wiping can permanently alter the Motorola One Hyper and may destroy data or bootability.
invariants.escalation: Stop and obtain explicit Jeremy approval before running any command or GUI action that rescues, repairs, flashes, erases, relocks, wipes, or otherwise writes firmware to the phone.
